architecturalRationales.d1: Unintegrated Canvas: Transition from manual copy-pasting to agentic components streamed directly into native creative tools.
architecturalRationales.d2: Single-Vendor Lock-in: Route tasks dynamically across a secure, cost-optimized Model Garden based on required context and speed.
architecturalRationales.d3: Disconnected Claims: Ground all agent generations in live Veeva Vault claims using Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
architecturalRationales.d4: Monolithic Reasoning: Transition from fragile single-prompt scripts to structured, graph-based multi-agent supervisor-worker topologies.
architecturalRationales.d5: Manual Audit Gaps: Deploy cryptographic lineage logs to automatically capture vector matches, data pulls, and agent state transitions.
architecturalRationales.d6: Procedural Bypass: Lock automated deployment gates until a verified, cryptographically signed human Quality Unit signature is bound.

benchmarks.benefitsRealized: Secured 42% reduction in protocol drafting cycles and 100% compliance with FDA dual-modality pacing guidelines.
Automated GxP lineage tracking across 12 countries, reducing MLR exception backlogs by 55%.
Integrated Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers with Veeva Vault, achieving zero-drift claims citation mapping.

architecturalRationales.d1: Unintegrated Canvas: Transition from manual copy-pasting to agentic components streamed directly into native creative tools.

architecturalRationales.d6: Procedural Bypass: Lock automated deployment gates until a verified, cryptographically signed human Quality Unit signature is bound.
